heading: Assistance during drought; water purchases
label: 2211 Assistance during drought; water purchases
notes: References in TextThe Bureau, referred to in heading for subsec. (c), probably means the Bureau of Reclamation.

children.heading: Construction, management, and conservation
children.label: a Construction, management, and conservation
children.text: Consistent with existing contractual arrangements and applicable State and applicable Federal law, and without further authorization, the Secretary is authorized to undertake construction, management, and conservation activities that will minimize, or can be expected to have an effect in minimizing, losses and damages resulting from drought conditions. Any construction activities undertaken pursuant to the authority of this subsection shall be limited to temporary facilities designed to minimize losses and damages from drought conditions, except that wells drilled to minimize losses and damages from drought conditions may be permanent facilities.

children.heading: Assistance to willing buyers and sellers
children.label: b Assistance to willing buyers and sellers
children.text: In order to minimize losses and damages resulting from drought conditions, the Secretary may provide nonfinancial assistance to willing buyers in their purchase of available water supplies from willing sellers.

children.heading: Water purchases by Bureau
children.label: c Water purchases by Bureau
children.text: In order to minimize losses and damages resulting from drought conditions, the Secretary may purchase water from willing sellers, including, but not limited to, water made available by Federal Reclamation project contractors through conservation or other means with respect to which the seller has reduced the consumption of water. Except with respect to water stored, conveyed or delivered to Federal and State wildlife habitat, the Secretary shall deliver such water pursuant to temporary contracts under : , That any such contract shall require recovery of any costs, including interest if applicable, incurred by the Secretary in acquiring such water.section 2212 of this titleProvided

children.heading: Water banks
children.label: d Water banks
children.text: In order to respond to a drought, the Secretary is authorized to participate in water banks established by a State.
